sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT currentDatabase() AS db_name, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND id > (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_table WHERE value LIKE 'f%') ORDER BY value;
SELECT count(*) AS cnt FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE LENGTH(value) > 3 GROUP BY value HAVING currentDatabase() > 'test_database');
SELECT currentDatabase(), value FROM test_table WHERE id < 5 AND id > (SELECT MIN(id) FROM (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL)) ORDER BY currentDatabase() DESC;
CREATE TABLE temp_table (col_a Int32, col_b String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY col_a;
SELECT currentDatabase(), AVG(col_a) FROM temp_table WHERE col_b IS NULL OR (col_b > 'B' AND currentDatabase() < 'test_database') GROUP BY col_b HAVING AVG(col_a) > 1;
SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND id < 5 ORDER BY currentDatabase();
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN new_col String;
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (6, 'six'), (7, '') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE value = currentDatabase();
SELECT DISTINCT value, currentDatabase() FROM test_table WHERE id > (SELECT MIN(id) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY value HAVING currentDatabase() > 'default';
